summary: Testing completed for iteration 11 features: Profitability Reports, AI Ticket Diagnosis, and Projects page bug fix. Backend: 13/15 tests passed (87%). Frontend: All critical features verified working.

minor.issue: Endpoint doesn't exist - correct endpoint is /api/super-admin/tickets

issues: Recharts library console warnings about chart dimensions - non-critical, library-level issue

backend_apis: GET /api/analytics/profitability - Returns valid profitability data structure
POST /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/ai-diagnosis - Generates AI diagnosis successfully using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
frontend_ui: Profitability page shows 4 summary cards: Total Facturado, Total Cobrado, Total Compras, Utilidad Bruta
Profitability page shows 'Desglose de Ventas' and 'Resumen de Rentabilidad' sections
Date filter inputs (Fecha Inicio, Fecha Fin) are visible and functional
Projects page loads without JavaScript errors (duplicate function bug FIXED)
Tickets Admin page shows ticket list
Ticket detail dialog opens when clicking 'Atender'
'Diagnóstico con IA' section visible in ticket detail
AI diagnosis content displayed correctly with structured format

profitability_reports.details: Page shows sales vs purchases analysis with date filters

ai_ticket_diagnosis.details: Uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with GPT-5.2 model for generating structured diagnosis
ai_ticket_diagnosis.ui_location: Ticket detail dialog in Super Admin Tickets page

projects_page_bug_fix.verification: Only one getFilteredProjects function at line 123, one openProjectDetail at line 223
projects_page_bug_fix.details: Search functionality works correctly, no JavaScript errors

critical_code_review_comments: Profitability API and AI Diagnosis API are properly implemented
Projects.js no longer has duplicate function definitions
AI diagnosis uses real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY integration - not mocked

success_rate.backend: 87% (13/15 tests passed - 2 minor failures due to wrong endpoint name in test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 features fully working: (1) Profitability Reports page at /empresa/{slug}/profitability with GET /api/analytics/profitability endpoint, (2) AI Ticket Diagnosis at POST /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/ai-diagnosis using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with GPT-5.2, visible in Super Admin ticket detail dialog with 'Re-analizar' button, (3) Projects.js duplicate function bug fixed - search works correctly. All backend APIs use correct authentication. AI diagnosis is real integration, NOT mocked.

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked for the tested features. AI Diagnosis uses real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY integration.
